steps.title: Use the mother's resistance
steps.content: John tried to reconcile his mother to his desire to travel, but Martha responded with self-pity and tears. The phrase describes trying to move her from resistance toward acceptance.

steps.title: Reject wrong senses
steps.content: B means make her apologize. C means make her match something. D means reunite with someone or something. The remaining phrase means get her to accept the idea. The answer is A.
